episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 382: Secret Lair Summer Superdrop
episode.description: James and Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and all the latest in LOTR price movement and the freshly dropped Secret Lair Summer Superdrop.
